LanguageData.ABY_CraftAshboundTreadBoots.label: forge ashbound tread boots
LanguageData.ABY_CraftAshboundTreadBoots.description: Assemble early abyssal tread boots from steel sole plates, residue shock pads and crude ember stabilizers.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftRiftstepGreaves.label: forge riftstep greaves
LanguageData.ABY_CraftRiftstepGreaves.description: Build mid-tier riftstep greaves around plasteel calf braces, stabilized heel conduits and phase-anchor soles.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftCrownpathSabatons.label: forge crownpath sabatons
LanguageData.ABY_CraftCrownpathSabatons.description: Fold late-line sabatons around a crownpath lattice, spacer-grade anchors and a crowned core fragment.
